meta.description: Synthetic dummy attack pattern for cybersecurity simulation in Docker environments
meta.warning: FOR SIMULATION USE ONLY — Do not use against real infrastructure

name: HTTP Slow Loris DoS
description: Holds open thousands of HTTP connections by sending partial headers slowly, exhausting server connection pool.

partial_headers:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: victim-web-service
X-Padding-Header-{n}: A

indicators_of_compromise: Max connection count constantly at limit
Many connections in ESTABLISHED state with no data transfer
Single source IP with thousands of open sockets
